# Implementation Plan / 实施计划: SQLite Local Persistence

**Branch**: `003-sqlite-storage` | **Date**: 2026-01-21 | **Spec**: /Users/hitol/code/ai/leek-fund/specs/003-sqlite-storage/spec.md  
**分支**：`003-sqlite-storage` | **日期**：2026-01-21 | **规格**：/Users/hitol/code/ai/leek-fund/specs/003-sqlite-storage/spec.md  
**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/003-sqlite-storage/spec.md`  
**输入**：来自 `/specs/003-sqlite-storage/spec.md` 的功能规格

**Note**: This plan is generated by `/speckit.plan`.  
**说明**：本计划由 `/speckit.plan` 生成。

## Summary / 概要

Persist all list data in a local SQLite database, migrate existing JSON data on first run, and provide recovery guidance if the database is missing or corrupted.  
将所有列表数据持久化到本地 SQLite 数据库，首次运行完成 JSON 迁移，并在数据库缺失或损坏时提供恢复指引。

## Technical Context / 技术背景

**Language/Version**: Rust 1.70+, TypeScript (React 18), Tauri 1.5  / **语言/版本**：Rust 1.70+、TypeScript（React 18）、Tauri 1.5  
**Primary Dependencies**: sqlx (SQLite), serde/serde_json  / **主要依赖**：sqlx（SQLite）、serde/serde_json  
**Storage**: Local SQLite database file in Tauri app data directory  / **存储**：Tauri 应用数据目录中的本地 SQLite 数据库文件  
**Testing**: cargo test for storage/migration modules  / **测试**：对 storage/migration 模块使用 cargo test  
**Target Platform**: macOS, Windows, Linux  / **目标平台**：macOS、Windows、Linux  
**Project Type**: Single repository with frontend + Tauri backend  / **项目类型**：单一仓库（前端 + Tauri 后端）  
**Performance Goals**: Startup reads lists within 2 seconds for typical data size  / **性能目标**：典型数据量下 2 秒内完成列表加载  
**Constraints**: Local-only storage; non-blocking I/O; migration must not lose data  / **约束**：仅本地存储；I/O 非阻塞；迁移不可丢数据  
**Scale/Scope**: Dozens of lists, up to a few thousand funds total  / **规模/范围**：几十个列表、总基金数不超过几千

## Constitution Check / 宪法检查

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*  
*关卡：在第 0 阶段调研前必须通过，第 1 阶段设计后需复检。*

- Real-time data from `fundgz.1234567.com.cn`, history from `fund.eastmoney.com/pingzhongdata/{code}.js`, and display data timestamp / 实时数据来自 `fundgz.1234567.com.cn`，历史数据来自 `fund.eastmoney.com/pingzhongdata/{code}.js`，并标注数据时间戳
- Local persistence and migration strategy defined, no loss of historical data / 本地持久化与迁移策略已定义，不丢失历史数据
- macOS/Windows/Linux behavior consistent, main thread non-blocking / macOS/Windows/Linux 行为一致，主线程不阻塞
- Only approved external services, no telemetry/data upload / 仅访问批准的外部服务，无遥测/数据上传
- Core module test plan defined, Tauri command contracts aligned / 核心模块测试计划明确，Tauri 命令契约已对齐

## Project Structure / 项目结构

### Documentation (this feature) / 文档（本功能）

```text
specs/003-sqlite-storage/
├── plan.md
├── research.md
├── data-model.md
├── quickstart.md
├── contracts/
└── tasks.md
```

### Source Code (repository root) / 源码（仓库根目录）

```text
src/
├── components/
├── hooks/
├── types/
└── App.tsx

src-tauri/
├── src/
│   ├── commands.rs
│   ├── models.rs
│   ├── modules/
│   │   ├── storage.rs
│   │   └── list_manager.rs
│   └── migrations/
└── Cargo.toml
```

**Structure Decision**: Keep existing single-repo layout; add SQLite storage and migration logic under `src-tauri/src/modules/` with any migration helpers under `src-tauri/src/migrations/`.  
**结构选择**：保持现有单仓结构；SQLite 存储与迁移逻辑放在 `src-tauri/src/modules/`，迁移辅助放在 `src-tauri/src/migrations/`。
